explanation: This is the original command that matches the Sigma rule. It sets the code page to 1251 (ANSI Cyrillic) using the MODE.COM utility.
The equals sign is followed by an escaped number using double backslashes, which may be parsed correctly by the command interpreter while still matching the rule.
A space is inserted between the equals sign and the value. This is a safe insertion that may evade detection if the rule is not robust to spacing variations.
